title: carex karlongensis subsp. handelii
intro: Carex karlongensis subsp. handelii, also known as the Handel's sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Carex karlongensis subsp. handelii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant involve drying and grinding the leaves and stems to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of ailments.
